message:
refactor: deduplicate SDK_TYPES, HTML templates, render pipeline, and bounding box logic

- Extract shared SDK_TYPES constant into src/sdk-types.ts (was duplicated in index.ts + worker)
- Merge buildRenderHTML/buildSvgHTML into buildExcalidrawHTML with pluggable render script
- Extract renderInBrowser helper to deduplicate renderPngLocal/renderSvgLocal browser lifecycle
- Extract computeBounds/computeNodeBounds helpers for 3 inline min/max loops
- Remove redundant globalIdCounter (SESSION_SEED already prevents cross-diagram collisions)
- Extract corsHeaders constant in worker to replace 7 inline repetitions
- Inline dead requestedFormat variable in worker
- Log WASM validation parse errors to stderr instead of silently swallowing
- Fix stale JSDoc on launchBrowser, remove inapplicable webpackIgnore comment
